# id

**Instance Property**

A stable per-link ID that can be used to uniquely identify this link. ID will be stable for the lifetime of a given App launch.

## Declaration

```swift
var id: WINetworkSharingProvider.AccessPointConnection.Link.ID { get }
```
title: id
